entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about combining the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to create full-stack applications. In this CodeJam, we will learn how to deploy and configure an instance of the SAP HANA Cloud trial, develop a multi-target application using SAP Business Application Studio and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and create a service layer and SAP Fiori UI that also includes SAP HANA native artifacts such as calculation views.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday, 9th April, 2025 from 09:00 to 16:00 IST.

We thank Mark9 Solutions, India for hosting this event at Chennai. 

Event venue:

Innov8 | Lazer St, South Phase, SIDCO Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600032, India

The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor is Developer Advocate @ajay_soreng 

There are essential pre-requisites that must be completed by every attendee before arriving at the event location. They are documented here:  https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md#normal-prerequisites-sap-business-application-studio

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 20 attendees. Register here on this Community Event page by clicking the Yes button in the 'Will you be attending'? section.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Maintain container with or without container unit
entry.content:
Hi all, I know with the multimodal functionality in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FSP02, we can create/assign containers and initiate creation of freight orders for pick up and delivery. I can see a number (like an internaly number of 10000) being assigned for each containers created. Can I check whether there is a way for me to view the container details outside of the freight booking app? Is there an app to view this?

I also have a requirement to have the containers created first and assigned later when the FUs are created due to special customer scenario. Is there a way for me to create the containers as an independent object first? I have been playing with container units and was able to create container units with the containers underneath. I was able to introduce multiple stops and assign the different legs to freight orders and freight bookings to track the movements of the containers. However, I am wondering whether I can achieve the same without the use of TU, i.e. container units?

Appreciate clarifications on the above.

Cheers

SFC

entry.title: Re: How to Implement Load Balancing in SAP CAP Node.js on...
entry.content:
Hi,

during normal operation you can use:

Application Autoscaler 

to add additional instances when needed or shut down instances when not needed anymore. But be aware that in the Cloud Foundry enviornment the costs are calculated based on the maximum memory used at one time in the month.

During deployment you should check out:

Blue-Green Deployment of Multitarget Applications 

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: FP2502 Client crash - session timed out.
entry.content:
Dear M911

Please try below workaround:

Currently workaround is modify the initializing cockpit start time manually

Open the Windows Registry Editor, navigate to HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Manage\SAP Business One, right-click the SAP Business One key, select New → DWORD (32-bit) Value, name the new DWORD as "CockpitStartTime", set the value to 10 in decimal, and restart SAP Business One. If the issue is not resolved, incrementally increase the value of "CockpitStartTime" to 20, then 30, and 40...

Let us know if it works.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - EDS ERROR - 400 : Invalid request parameters...
entry.content:
Dear Rodolfo_Rabelo

The issue is the certificate, Can you please try again to download according to the note 3426034
IL_Various errors received when working with electronic invoices for IL due to missing certificate and send the screenshot of the certificate? 

If the issue is still reproduced , we will need a full EDS logs , please follow the exact steps.:

Important things to consider before collecting the detail debug logs:

Go to the EDS dashboard and set the Log Level to Debug for all the relevant Service Connectors, Protocol Connectors, and API Connectors.
Stop the EDS service.
Delete or rename the existing EDS logs folder .
Restart the EDS service.
Log in into SAP Business One and reproduce the issue. Once the issue has been reproduced, collect the EDS logs and attach them to the incident using component SBO-SD-ELD as we need to investigate this issue at our side.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error when logging into SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear JerushaLala

Currently workaround is modify the initializing cockpit start time manually

Open the Windows Registry Editor, navigate to HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Manage\SAP Business One, right-click the SAP Business One key, select New → DWORD (32-bit) Value, name the new DWORD as "CockpitStartTime", set the value to 10 in decimal, and restart SAP Business One. If the issue is not resolved, incrementally increase the value of "CockpitStartTime" to 20, then 30, and 40...

Please let us know if above steps will fix this issue.

kind Regards

Nidhi
